name: TrainClicker Idle Evolution
short_description: 🚂 Cozy idle train game. Enjoy a journey from steam to modern locomotives in idle style! 🚂
detailed_description:
🚂 TrainClicker Idle Evolution – Relax. Upgrade. Collect! 🚂

Looking for a cozy and relaxing adventure to chill out with? Welcome aboard TrainClicker Idle Evolution, where you’ll build, upgrade, and customize your very own train as it travels through beautiful handcrafted landscapes. Relax with idle progress or test your management skills in this epic journey.

Choose your play style: kick back and chill or strategize and rise to the top! The journey is yours to shape, and with the right upgrades, you’ll evolve your train from a humble handcar to a mighty long locomotive.

🛤️ What Makes This Ride Awesome:

✅ Relax and Play Your Way – Whether you want a casual chill vibe or a challenge, we've got you!
✅ Beautifully Crafted Zones – Travel through stunning, cozy environments with unique themes.
✅ Engineer Heroes – Unlock and upgrade heroes with special abilities to automate progress and keep things rolling!
✅ Endless Customization & Upgrades – From handcars to steam, diesel, and beyond—build YOUR ultimate train!
✅ Optimized Progression for Maximum Fun – Experience that sweet, satisfying feeling when every upgrade just clicks.

Hop aboard and start your journey today!

🚂 We’re waiting for you at the next station! 🚂
